description_long: This is a compact, rectangular keyboard with a dark, matte finish and a slim profile. The keys are closely spaced and uniformly sized, with a low-profile design typical of modern portable keyboards. A single, thin cable extends from one side, indicating a wired connection. The surface appears smooth and hard, with no visible branding or decorative elements. The keyboard is likely constructed from plastic with internal electronic components. Its minimalist design suggests it is intended for efficient, space-saving use in urban environments such as offices, kiosks, or public terminals.
description: A compact, dark-colored wired keyboard with a slim, low-profile design and closely spaced keys.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the keyboard and the cable extending upward from the center.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile and the cable extending horizontally from the left side.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back edge of the keyboard and the cable trailing downward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the cable extending horizontally from the right side, emphasizing the keyboard's slimness.
